# Let's open the file and read content
path = '/mnt/data/file-XkNp5SdpcNu7L1hwPt9Rhy-text_to_analyse.txt'
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()

len(text), text[:2000]

text = text  # from previous cell
# Find curly brace groups
positions = []
# Ayahs: {...}
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('{', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('}', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    inner = text[i+1:j]
    # Trim whitespace at edges
    lstrip_len = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
    rstrip_len = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
    start_idx = i+1 + lstrip_len
    end_idx = j - rstrip_len
    span_text = text[start_idx:end_idx]
    positions.append(("Aya", start_idx, end_idx, span_text))
    start = j+1

# Hadiths: «...»
start = 0
while True:
    i = text.find('«', start)
    if i == -1:
        break
    j = text.find('»', i+1)
    if j == -1:
        break
    inner = text[i+1:j]
    # Trim whitespace
    lstrip_len = len(inner) - len(inner.lstrip())
    rstrip_len = len(inner) - len(inner.rstrip())
    start_idx = i+1 + lstrip_len
    end_idx = j - rstrip_len
    span_text = text[start_idx:end_idx]
    positions.append(("Hadeeth", start_idx, end_idx, span_text))
    start = j+1

# Sort by start index
positions.sort(key=lambda x: x[1])
positions
